target.title: refactor: route transcript writers through session seam
target.body:
## What

Path 3 / PR 3.1b transcript writers route core transcript turn append/touch/update behavior through the session accessor seam while preserving current file-backed transcript behavior. Refs #88838.

## Why

This keeps writer-domain granularity separated from the later SQLite storage flip: file-backed runtime behavior remains canonical now, while the accessor exposes the transaction boundary SQLite needs next.

## Changes

- Add transcript turn writer operation
- Route assistant, user, gateway, and command writes
- Preserve lock, idempotency, and update behavior
- Cover ordered multi-effect writer behavior in tests

## Testing

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/config/sessions/session-accessor.test.ts src/config/sessions/transcript.test.ts src/sessions/user-turn-transcript.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.inject.parentid.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.test.ts src/agents/command/attempt-execution.cli.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/server-methods.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat-b.test.ts src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts` passed 4 shards / 459 tests.
- `{ git diff --name-only upstream/main...HEAD; git diff --name-only; } | sort -u | xargs ./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check` passed on 24 files.
- `{ git diff --name-only upstream/main...HEAD; git diff --name-only; } | sort -u | xargs node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs` passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json && git diff --check` passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/core-test.tsbuildinfo` passed.
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test.tsbuildinfo` passed.
- `node scripts/check-session-accessor-boundary.mjs && node --import tsx scripts/check-import-cycles.ts && node --import tsx scripts/check-madge-import-cycles.ts` passed.
- `node scripts/check-deprecated-api-usage.mjs && node scripts/check-deprecated-jsdoc.mjs && node scripts/check-database-first-legacy-stores.mjs` passed.
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main` reported no accepted/actionable findings.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Transcript writer paths for assistant/user turns, command transcript turns, and gateway-injected chat messages now route through the session accessor writer-domain operation while preserving file-backed transcript writes, session metadata touches, parent ordering, append lock ordering, and transcript update delivery.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout at PR head `de72b58cd81481a018378d12ebaa018da0cb1ddc` loaded into `~/Projects/clawdbot`; macOS 15.6.1 arm64; Node 24.15.0; local Gateway LaunchAgent restarted and reachable at `ws://127.0.0.1:18789`; default `main` agent using OpenAI `gpt-5.5`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:
1. `git fetch upstream clawdbot-d08/31b-transcript-writer-seam && git checkout --detach de72b58cd81481a018378d12ebaa018da0cb1ddc`
2. `pnpm openclaw gateway restart && pnpm openclaw status`
3. `pnpm openclaw agent --session-key agent:main:pr89123-real-proof-de72b58c-20260616-0500 --message "Real behavior proof for PR 89123 final SHA de72b58c. Reply with exactly: PR89123 transcript writer domain operation live proof OK" --timeout 300 --json`
4. `pnpm openclaw gateway call chat.inject --json --timeout 30000 --params '{"sessionKey":"agent:main:pr89123-real-proof-de72b58c-20260616-0500","agentId":"main","message":"PR89123 transcript writer domain operation gateway inject live proof OK","label":"PR89123 de72b58c writer-domain proof"}'`
5. Parsed the resolved session JSONL transcript file for the proof strings and parent links.

Evidence after fix: Copied live terminal output from the restarted local Gateway and session transcript inspection:

```text
OpenClaw status
Git                  git · @ de72b58c
Gateway              local · ws://127.0.0.1:18789 (local loopback) · reachable 48ms
Gateway service      LaunchAgent installed · loaded · running (pid 5502)

pnpm openclaw agent ... --json
{
  "runId": "9fd62900-fff8-4bf4-aa87-e4b0d2d634df",
  "status": "ok",
  "summary": "completed",
  "result": {
    "payloads": [
      {
        "text": "PR89123 transcript writer domain operation live proof OK",
        "mediaUrl": null
      }
    ],
    "meta": {
      "agentMeta": {
        "sessionId": "9052a711-315c-431f-bf8a-5f5bff1ee101",
        "sessionFile": "/Users/phaedrus/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/9052a711-315c-431f-bf8a-5f5bff1ee101.jsonl",
        "provider": "openai",
        "model": "gpt-5.5"
      }
    }
  }
}

pnpm openclaw gateway call chat.inject ...
{
  "ok": true,
  "messageId": "b297831f-3d9e-46e4-98b4-e99c0fb33417"
}

JSONL transcript inspection for agent:main:pr89123-real-proof-de72b58c-20260616-0500:
sessionId=9052a711-315c-431f-bf8a-5f5bff1ee101
sessionFile=/Users/phaedrus/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/9052a711-315c-431f-bf8a-5f5bff1ee101.jsonl
line 5 id=152e8f21 parentId=f26cb9b7 text="Real behavior proof for PR 89123 final SHA de72b58c. Reply with exactly: PR89123 transcript writer domain operation live proof OK"
line 6 id=6caebe97 parentId=152e8f21 text="PR89123 transcript writer domain operation live proof OK"
line 7 id=b297831f-3d9e-46e4-98b4-e99c0fb33417 parentId=6caebe97 text="[PR89123 de72b58c writer-domain proof]\n\nPR89123 transcript writer domain operation gateway inject live proof OK"
```

Observed result after fix: The real local Gateway restarted on the final PR head, a live agent run completed successfully, the gateway-injected chat message returned `ok: true`, and the proof transcript persisted the user row, assistant response row, and injected assistant row once and in parent order.

What was not tested: Full release, Docker, cross-OS, and channel delivery suites were not run for this narrow transcript-writer seam refresh.

Proof limitations or environment constraints: This proof used the local source checkout and local LaunchAgent Gateway, not a packaged install. Status output included preexisting local warnings about a legacy state-dir symlink, a disabled `active-memory` plugin config entry, and an already archived migrated plugin install index; none blocked the Gateway or transcript proof.
